name: Product Hunt Digest
description: Get a daily digest of top Product Hunt launches

agents.name: PH Fetcher
agents.system_prompt_hint: Fetch today's top Product Hunt launches. Get product names, descriptions, upvote counts, maker info, and links. Focus on the top 10-15 products.

agents.name: PH Summarizer
agents.purpose: Create a readable Product Hunt digest
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a digest of today's best launches. Group by category (developer tools, AI, design, etc). Include brief descriptions and why each product is interesting.

suggestion_card.title: Product Hunt Digest
suggestion_card.subtitle: Daily top launches
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Get today's top Product Hunt launches

author: agentfactory
